{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Sublines
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The audio-only call was stretched over several [[Sublines]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c1">''The Engineer'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Sublines]] are communication channels used to reach others.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
